## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX.ai for Lux Capital portfolio company Maven.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Need:** Lux Capital's portfolio company, Maven, requires a foundational organic marketing engine (content, SEO) to generate MQLs/SQLs, as its technical founders lack marketing expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX.ai builds organic content engines (e.g., \~5 articles/week) for technical clients, handling strategy, execution, and LLM visibility monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**The Fit:** GrowthX.ai is a strong fit. Its model requires minimal client input (e.g., competitor list), making it ideal for Maven's non-marketing founders.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Scott will introduce GrowthX.ai to Maven's CEO and Lux Capital's board member, Grace Isford, to evaluate if GrowthX.ai can provide immediate momentum before a permanent marketing hire.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Topics

### Maven's Marketing Challenge

  - [Maven, a Lux Capital portfolio company, needs a foundational organic marketing engine.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [**Problem:** Technical founders lack marketing expertise; prior attempts to hire a full-time marketer were unsuccessful.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build a content engine for top-of-funnel MQLs/SQLs and brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Context:** Scott is sourcing fractional CMOs and was referred to GrowthX.ai by executive search consultant Gia Shinto.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Organic Marketing Model

  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel, who built organic content engines at IBM, HashiCorp, and Service Titan.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Core Philosophy:** Brands should be publishers, not just advertisers.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Develops SEO/GEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Publishes \~5 articles/week (new + refreshes), starting with blogs for AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Handles staging, publishing, and LLM visibility monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Ideal Client:** Lean teams needing high-volume, quality content without the bandwidth to create it.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Fit for Maven

  - [**Concern:** Can GrowthX.ai work directly with non-marketing founders?](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [**GrowthX.ai's View:** Yes, this is a common and effective model.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The client's lack of marketing expertise allows GrowthX.ai to be the trusted expert, reducing friction.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [**Client Input:** Minimal, focused on business context (e.g., competitors, authority topics).](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [**Time Commitment:** Low, requiring only an initial kickoff/deep dive and timely draft reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**Relevant Case Study: AugmentCode**](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Client:** Technical founder competing with Cursor/GitHub Copilot.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Created comprehensive guides (listicles, comparisons, code snippets) to own search for topics like "large code bases."](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Result:** Organic traffic 3x'd in 6 months (20k → 60k/month), enabling the client to taper paid ad spend to zero.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send Scott the GrowthX.ai deck and case studies (AugmentCode, Airbyte) within 2–3 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Scott:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [Review materials with Grace Isford (Lux Capital board member).](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [Make a warm intro to Maven's CEO, Jonathan, and the co-founders.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**GrowthX.ai:** Schedule a discovery call with Maven for after the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Timeline:** A Phase 1 kickoff is 4–6 weeks out, targeting a mid-February start.](https://fathom.video/share/DqywqsLbQNkuiKYovH8nV41Gsxh9bZDV?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
